# render-detail

Per-plugin db-schema section in the plugin detail pane. Contributes a
`PluginView.Section` that reads `node.facets["db-schema"]` and renders the
plugin's tables (SQL name + TS var), the entity extensions it declares
("Extends" → parent plugin + side-table), and the reverse relationships
("Extended by" → child plugin + side-table). Plugin names link to their detail
pane via `PluginLink`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Per-plugin db-schema section in the plugin detail pane.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginViewSlots.Section` "db-schema" → `DbSchemaDetailSection`
  - Uses:
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginLink`
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginNode`
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-view.PluginViewSlots`
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-view.Section`
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-view.SubHeading`
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/css/text.Text`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
